lesson.menu_title: What Do You Do? -- Talking About Work Without Freezing
lesson.menu_desc: Dialogue + present simple for your job and routine -- 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- What Do You Do? -- Talking About Work Without Freezing
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 3 -- What Do You Do?

listenings.text: Hi! I am David. I work in finance, too. Every day, I talk to clients. I analyze their numbers and I write reports for them. I manage a small team of three people. I am responsible for the big accounts. I have many tasks, and I always have a deadline. But I like my job a lot. Numbers are my world. What about you? What do you do?

Good morning. My name is Paula. I am an analyst on the finance team. I start my day at nine. First, I check my email. Then I open my spreadsheet and I analyze the numbers. At eleven, we have a meeting. In the afternoon, I write a report for my manager. I am responsible for two clients. My work is busy, but I love it. Every day is different.

extra_audio.text: Hello! My name is Maisa. I work in finance. I manage a small team. I analyze reports every day.
